	Summary: Confirmed React (Vite) frontend with Tailwind, routing, and Matter.js bubble UI.

	Summary: Vite React app scaffolded into this folder, dependencies installed.

	Summary: Created and launched VS Code task to run Vite dev server.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Summary: Prompted for debug launch and executed the debug start command.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	Summary: README and copilot instructions are updated for the current project state; HTML comments removed.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
